requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety - EESS In-Scope Electrical Equipment + RCM
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 - EESS范围内电气设备 + RCM
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 - EESS範圍內電氣設備 + RCM

summary.en: Wireless/IoT devices that are in-scope electrical equipment under the Electrical Equipment Safety System must satisfy Australian electrical safety requirements before sale in participating jurisdictions. Products supplied at low voltage, plug packs, chargers, power supplies, mains-powered hubs, and similar accessories may trigger EESS safety obligations. The mandatory obligations are the EESS equipment safety rules, responsible supplier obligations, registration where required, and RCM marking. AS/NZS 62368.1, AS/NZS 61558, AS/NZS 60950 legacy evidence where accepted, or other product standards may be used as safety evidence routes; the standards are evidence routes, not the mandatory law themselves.
summary.zh: 无线/物联网设备如属于电气设备安全系统（EESS）范围内电气设备，须在参与辖区销售前满足澳大利亚电气安全要求。低电压供电产品、插头电源、充电器、电源适配器、市电供电网关及类似附件可能触发EESS安全义务。强制义务包括EESS设备安全规则、责任供应商义务、要求时的设备注册以及RCM标志。AS/NZS 62368.1、AS/NZS 61558、可接受时的AS/NZS 60950旧版证据或其他产品标准可作为安全证据路径；这些标准是证据路径，不是强制法律本身。
summary.zht: 無線/物聯網裝置如屬於電氣設備安全系統（EESS）範圍內電氣設備，須在參與轄區銷售前滿足澳洲電氣安全要求。低電壓供電產品、插頭電源、充電器、電源適配器、市電供電閘道器及類似配件可能觸發EESS安全義務。強制義務包括EESS設備安全規則、責任供應商義務、要求時的設備註冊以及RCM標誌。AS/NZS 62368.1、AS/NZS 61558、可接受時的AS/NZS 60950舊版證據或其他產品標準可作為安全證據路徑；這些標準是證據路徑，不是強制法律本身。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Equipment Safety System equipment safety rules - mandatory for in-scope electrical equipment in participating jurisdictions
EESS RCM marking requirements - mandatory where EESS applies
AS/NZS 62368.1 - Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety requirements (voluntary evidence route)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for covered IT, telecom, chargers, power adapters, and similar products is commonly handled through CCC certification and GB safety standards such as GB 4943.1 for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment. CCC is a mandatory Chinese market approval where listed, but it is not an Australian EESS registration, certificate, or RCM authorization.
summary.zh: 在中国，列入范围的IT、电信、充电器、电源适配器及类似产品的电气安全通常通过CCC认证及GB 4943.1等GB安全标准处理。CCC在列入目录时是中国强制市场准入批准，但不是澳大利亚EESS注册、证书或RCM授权。
summary.zht: 在中國，列入範圍的IT、電信、充電器、電源適配器及類似產品的電氣安全通常通過CCC認證及GB 4943.1等GB安全標準處理。CCC在列入目錄時是中國強制市場准入批准，但不是澳洲EESS註冊、證書或RCM授權。

standards_or_laws: CCC - China Compulsory Certification for listed electrical and electronic products
GB 4943.1 - Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment safety requirements
CNCA implementation rules for applicable product categories

gap.en: A Chinese CCC certificate may help identify the tested construction, but the Australian supplier must still determine whether the product is in-scope electrical equipment, identify its EESS risk level, hold acceptable safety evidence, register Level 2 or Level 3 equipment where required, and apply the RCM. Common gaps include Australian plug and supply configuration, AS/NZS deviations, certificate holder identity, responsible supplier registration, and whether the external power supply is treated as a separate in-scope item.
gap.zh: 中国CCC证书可帮助识别已测试结构，但澳大利亚供应商仍须判断产品是否为EESS范围内电气设备，识别EESS风险等级，持有可接受安全证据，在要求时注册Level 2或Level 3设备，并加贴RCM。常见差距包括澳大利亚插头和电源配置、AS/NZS差异、证书持有人身份、责任供应商注册，以及外部电源是否作为单独范围内项目处理。
gap.zht: 中國CCC證書可幫助識別已測試結構，但澳洲供應商仍須判斷產品是否為EESS範圍內電氣設備，識別EESS風險等級，持有可接受安全證據，在要求時註冊Level 2或Level 3設備，並加貼RCM。常見差距包括澳洲插頭和電源配置、AS/NZS差異、證書持有人身份、責任供應商註冊，以及外部電源是否作為單獨範圍內項目處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory - EESS electrical safety, registration, and RCM obligations apply to in-scope electrical equipment in participating jurisdictions
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory - CCC applies to listed electrical and electronic products in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EESS electrical safety is a separate Australian requirement for in-scope electrical equipment and accessories. CCC and GB 4943.1 evidence from China may support engineering review, but the Australian supplier must satisfy EESS classification, evidence, registration, and RCM marking duties.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EESS电气安全是范围内电气设备及附件的独立澳大利亚要求。中国CCC和GB 4943.1证据可支持工程审查，但澳大利亚供应商必须满足EESS分类、证据、注册及RCM标志义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EESS電氣安全是範圍內電氣設備及配件的獨立澳洲要求。中國CCC和GB 4943.1證據可支持工程審查，但澳洲供應商必須滿足EESS分類、證據、註冊及RCM標誌義務。
